svg.title: Prompt Engineering infographic — ABTalks 60 Days Claude Challenge
svg.desc: A LinkedIn-style infographic explaining Prompt Engineering: definition, weak vs improved prompt comparison, and three benefits.
svg.text: The skill of communicating effectively with AI
Prompt engineering is the skill of writing
clear and detailed instructions for AI tools
so they generate better, more relevant results.
Pro tip: The more context, audience detail, and format guidance
you give AI, the more it behaves like a skilled expert — not a guesser.
Learn AI Smarter • ABTalks 60 Days Claude Challenge
